hero.title: Strategic Oversight for the AI Era
hero.subtitle: Independent advisory for Corporate Boards and Executive Committees. Building the governance frameworks required to safely navigate and capitalize on Artificial Intelligence.

challenge.title: The AI Governance Challenge
challenge.subtitle: Boards are responsible for supervising AI, yet most lack the required strategic frameworks. This creates critical exposure.
challenge.content: Tuyo helps boards build the strategic clarity and governance structures required to supervise AI, moving from isolated technical initiatives to a clear supervisory framework.

advisor.title: AI Board Advisor
advisor.description: Ongoing partnership providing quarterly reviews, investment evaluation, and monitoring of emerging technological and regulatory risks.

philosophy.title: Independent Advisory
philosophy.content: Artificial Intelligence is not a technical implementation; it is a fundamental shift in corporate governance. My work ensures that Board Directors have the clarity, language, and independent frameworks required to supervise this transition.
philosophy.long: Boards hire independent advisors because internal management is often conflicted by operational goals. Tuyo provides the vendor-agnostic, strategic distance required to evaluate the true risks and opportunities of AI adoption.

bio.title: Executive Summary
bio.content: Tuyo Isaza is a transformation strategist working at the intersection of leadership, organizational culture, and artificial intelligence adoption. With more than two decades of experience across multinational environments, he helps leaders preserve strategic clarity and organizational alignment during technological shifts.

experience.title: Professional Record
experience.content: Collaborated with global organizations across Latin America and the United States, advising brands such as Microsoft, McDonald's, Nokia, Citibank, and Kellogg's. Tuyo is an international speaker, author, and leadership advisor focusing on innovation and technology-driven change.

Insights.title: Executive Insights
Insights.subtitle: A curated selection of frameworks, playbooks, and strategic perspectives designed exclusively for corporate directors and executive committees.

faqs.q: What is the difference between AI management and AI governance?
faqs.a: Management focuses on implementing tools and driving operational ROI. Governance focuses on defining ethical guardrails, evaluating systemic risks, setting strategic policy, and ensuring alignment with long-term corporate value.

faqs.q: Do board directors need technical AI expertise?
faqs.a: No. Directors require a strategic, framework-driven understanding of the technology's impacts, risks, and limitations. They need to know what questions to ask, not how the underlying neural network functions.
